abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Soul Burn
abilities.text: When this model gains a Slow token, it may instead be dealt 2 irreducible damage.

triggers.name: Under Pressure
triggers.text: Move the target 2" away from this model.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

actions.name: Disembodied Voices
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may draw LoS and range from allies.
actions.effects: Target gains a Fright token. For each raise this action receives, move the target 2". If the target is dealt falling damage during this action, increase that damage by +2.

actions.name: Evading Leap
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range. Until the end of the current activation, this model cannot declare attack actions.
